flashcards.back: Distance from center (r), azimuthal angle (θ), polar angle (φ).

flashcards.front: What's the difference: θ vs φ?
flashcards.back: θ = horizontal angle (longitude). φ = vertical angle (latitude/elevation).
Spherical symmetry. Atoms, planets, radiation from a point.
1000 units from center, at 45° azimuth, 60° elevation.
